Object.name: PromptTabelaPrecop
Object.description: Consulta de Cadastro de Tabela de Preços

Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Height = 800 Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &TabSts = nullvalue(&TabSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Consulta de Cadastro de Tabela de Preços' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaLinhaTam.Call(&linhaNumeric, &TamanhoNumeric) TableMain.Height = &TamanhoNumeric Grid.Rows = &linhaNumeric if &TabDtaIni.IsEmpty() &TabDtaIni = serverdate() &TabSts.SetEmpty() EndiF &TabCod1.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "Contém") EndCase EndIf EndIf &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount TabSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Select = !'' Do Case Case TabSts = StatusTabela.NormalAtiva TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.Inativa TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.Promocao TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case TabSts = StatusTabela.EmConstrucao TabSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise TabSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxTabCod = TabCod if TabIsAllAre = true &Areas = 'TODAS' Else do 'getAreas' Endif if TabIsAllUfe = true &Ufs = 'TODAS' Else do 'getUFs' EndIf EndEvent Event Enter /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &InOutTabCod = TabCod Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabCod1.Visible = False &TabNom1.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre1.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABCOD' &TabCod1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabCod2.Visible = False &TabNom2.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre2.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABCOD' &TabCod2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TabCod3.Visible = False &TabNom3.Visible = False &TabIsAllAre3.Visible = False &TabIsAllUfe3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABCOD' &TabCod3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' &TabNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &TabCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &TabCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' &TabIsAllAre1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' &TabIsAllUfe1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABCOD' AND not &TabCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabCod1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABCOD' AND not &TabCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabCod2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABCOD' AND not &TabCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabCod3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABNOM' AND not &TabNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLARE' AND not &TabIsAllAre3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllAre3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABISALLUFE' AND not &TabIsAllUfe3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabIsAllUfe3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'getUFs' &Ufs = '' &Count = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, TabCod, TabUfeCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &AuxTabCod if &Count > 0 &Ufs += ', ' Endif &Count += 1 &Ufs += trim(TabUfeCod) EndFor EndSub Sub 'getAreas' &Areas = '' &Count = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, TabCod, TabAreCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &AuxTabCod if &Count > 0 &Areas += ', ' Endif &Count += 1 &Areas += trim(str(TabAreCod)) EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Consulta de Cadastro de Tabela de Preços
